title: gentiana langbianensis subsp. langbianensis
intro: Gentiana langbianensis subsp. langbianensis is a species of flowering plant in the gentian family, native to Vietnam. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties. The medicinal properties of Gentiana langbianensis subsp. langbianensis are attributed to the presence of iridoid glycosides, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, providing various health benefits including reduced inflammation and improved immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties and alleviate respiratory issues.
